## Verification

- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` is clean
- [ ] `govulncheck ./...` is clean (see CONTRIBUTING.md for the versioned command)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the behavior change
